description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 tenant-security cluster. Pins database RLS policy audit/authoring apart from app-layer isolation testing, general migration review, and inspection-based isolation review. Includes discrimination against the shipped tenant-isolation-reviewer.

cases.prompt: Review our Postgres row-level-security policies on tenant tables for recursion, SECURITY DEFINER misuse, missing WITH CHECK, and client-supplied tenant scope.
cases.reason: Database-layer RLS policy text audit with per-command failure-mode hunting and a DB negative-test plan.

cases.prompt: Build the negative-test suite that proves the API and export endpoints deny cross-tenant access.
cases.reason: Application/API/cross-surface isolation testing, not database policy text.

cases.prompt: Review this migration that adds columns, changes GRANTs, drops a table, and edits some policies — is it safe to ship?
cases.reason: Whole-migration safety (privilege changes, destructive ops, deploy order) is the migration reviewer's scope; the RLS portion can be delegated here.

cases.prompt: Across the whole app — storage, logs, search, support tools — where can tenant data leak? Give me findings.
cases.reason: Cross-surface leak inspection beyond the database is the isolation reviewer; RLS auditor is database-policy-scoped.
